message:
feat(server): Implement dynamic enable/disable per-session visibility

Add support for dynamically enabling/disabling tools, resources, and
prompts on a per-session basis. This allows servers to adapt available
functionality based on user permissions, feature flags, or runtime
conditions.

Changes:
- Add McpContext methods: disable_tool/resource/prompt, enable_tool/
  resource/prompt, is_tool/resource/prompt_enabled, disabled_tools/
  resources/prompts
- Add SessionState methods for checking disabled state from router
- Add filtered list methods to Router that exclude disabled components
- Modify list handlers to accept optional SessionState for filtering
- Modify call/read/get handlers to check disabled state and return
  clear errors for disabled components
- Add comprehensive unit tests for all new functionality

Key features:
- Components enabled by default unless explicitly disabled
- Session-local changes (don't affect other sessions)
- Disabled components hidden from list responses
- Clear error messages when calling disabled components

Closes: bd-2d4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
